sections.paragraph: fem. darkness of Jehovah, i.e. thick darkness, from מַאֲפֵל and יָה = יָהּ (like שַׁלְהֶבֶתְיָה Son 8:6). Jerem. 2:31 , אֶרֶץ מַאְפֵּלְיָה “a land of thick darkness;” used of a desert as being pathless, in which one wanders as in darkness; compare as to the same, verse , אֶרֶץ עַלְמָוֶת and Job 30:3.
